race.comment: UBER IN (11) settled well back then came home powerfully to score over 1300m at Canberra last time out. In form and will take beating again. MILLY MOLLY MANDY (8) pushed forward and went on to record a determined win over 1280m at Orange. Has the class to play a significant role. TANGO ON (10) showed good speed and fought on for third over 1000m at Canberra last time. Won't find this as tough. One to consider. ROYAL MEMORY (14) hasn't been far away recently including last time out when third over 1200m at Queanbeyan. Has a win and five minor placings at this journey from seven starts and has solid claims.
